security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.
An attacker can craft arbitrary vote messages

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote message integrity is not guaranteed.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Vote messages are not digitally signed or otherwise authenticated.

assumptions: The governance contract does not validate the integrity of vote messages.
An attacker can modify vote messages before submission.
An attacker can intercept and manipulate vote messages during transit

mitigation.strategy: Implement message integrity checks (e.g., using digital signatures or hash verification).

description: An attacker may tamper with vote messages to alter the outcome of a governance proposal.

security_gap.gap_description: Lack of non-repudiation mechanisms for vote submissions.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system lacks mechanisms to prove the origin and authenticity of votes.

assumptions: The governance contract does not provide mechanisms for non-repudiation.
An attacker can successfully submit a vote and deny doing so later.
There's no logging or audit trail to definitively verify who submitted a vote

mitigation.strategy: Implement digital signatures for vote submissions and maintain a detailed audit log of voting activity.

description: An attacker may cast a vote and later deny having done so.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes might be exposed before finalization.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Vote data might be exposed in the voting interface before being processed.

assumptions: Vote data is not encrypted during transmission or processing.
The voting interface exposes vote information to other users or system components.
An attacker can access the voting interface and obtain vote information

mitigation.strategy: Implement end-to-end encryption for vote data and restrict access to sensitive information.

description: An attacker might gain access to vote information before it's processed.
